title: Amethyst Gear [NETH AND DIAMOND]
description: Turns Diamond Armour and tools into an amethyst-like colour. Also turns netherite gear into amethyst-like color
body:
On the Left Side is Diamond Gear
On the Right Side is Netherite Gear![Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ac566477cf32edb24edc4dbf0ff64554e049d4.png)
